arts.ttl: Liam Fox feels Hearts fan pressure from afar as interim boss senses 'step forward' ahead of Minsk task
arts.sum: It won't be easy for the Jambos but the interim boss is confident his team are up to it

arts.ttl: Dinamo Minsk not worried about Hearts fan lockout as veteran star makes Tynecastle admission

arts.sum: It's been a rocky start to the season for the Jambos
